zh.lifeSummary: 當William Mallory III Esq.於1404年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾赫頓 康聶爾斯時，他的父親William Mallory29歲，母親Lady Jane Plumpton23歲。他於1422年11月之前與Dyonisia Tempest在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1475年4月25日在英國越可爾赫頓 康聶爾斯享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Mallory III Esq.于1404年出生在英国英格兰越可爾赫頓 康聶爾斯时，他的父亲William Mallory29岁，母亲Lady Jane Plumpton23岁。他于1422年11月之前与Dyonisia Tempest在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1475年4月25日在英国越可爾赫頓 康聶爾斯享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mallory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname for an unfortunate person, from Old French maloret, maloré, maleuré ‘ill-fortuned, unlucky’.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Mallory III Esq. was born in 1404, in Hutton Conyers, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Mallory, was 29 and his mother, Lady Jane Plumpton, was 23. He married Dyonisia Tempest before November 1422, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 25 April 1475, in Hutton Conyers, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Mallory III Esq. est né en 1404, à Hutton Conyers, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Mallory, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Jane Plumpton, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Dyonisia Tempest avant novembre 1422, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 25 avril 1475, à Hutton Conyers, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William Mallory III Esq.が1404年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハットオン コニーエルズで生まれた時，父William Malloryは29歳，母Lady Jane Plumptonは23歳であった。1422年11月以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアでDyonisia Tempestと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1475年4月25日にイギリスヨークシュアイアハットオン コニーエルズで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Mallory III Esq.(이)가 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 후턴 코니어스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Mallory(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Jane Plumpton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1422년 11월 이전 영국 요르크실르에서 Dyonisia Tempest(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1475년 4월 25일 영국 요르크실르 후턴 코니어스에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Mallory III Esq. nasceu em 1404, em Hutton Conyers, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Mallory, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jane Plumpton, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Dyonisia Tempest antes novembro de 1422, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de abril de 1475, em Hutton Conyers, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Mallory III Esq. родился в 1404 г. в местности хуттон кониирс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Mallory было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane Plumpton, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Dyonisia Tempest перед ноябрь 1422 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 25 апреля 1475 г. в местности хуттон кониирс, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 71 год.
